top3.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%';

SELECT Patient.ID, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Diagnosis = 'Positive degree of coagulation';

SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%';

SELECT p.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%';

SELECT Patient.ID, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Diagnosis = 'Positive degree of coagulation';

SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%';

SELECT p.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%';

SELECT p.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE (e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%')
   OR (e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%');

final.sql:
SELECT p.ID, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%coagulation%' AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%positive%';
